name: Hot Fig Pudding
recipeInstructions:
Pudding: Cream the butter until soft. Beat in eggs and molasses until fluffy. Stir in figs, lemon peel, and buttermilk. In a separate bowl, sift together baking soda, baking powder, ground ginger, salt, and flour. Stir the dry ingredients into the pudding mixture. Pour into a greased 9-inch tube pan. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour until done.
Sauce: Cream the butter and sugar until light. Beat in eggs. Stir in sherry, lemon peel, and nutmeg. Shortly before serving, heat the sauce over hot water in a double boiler. Serve with hot pudding.
